_doc: Editor directives, anchored to .mob source line numbers. The .mob owns choreography; this file owns post-production. Pipeline: highlights → zoom → speedups → export. Remove the _doc fields when you copy this template.

trim._doc: Optional. fromLine/toLine reference .mob action lines. Defaults to first action → last action end + 600 ms.

directives._doc: ZOOM. side ∈ before|during|after. center optional — defaults to the tap's (x,y), swipe midpoint, or screen center. rampMs optional (default 200). windowMs optional — set when the resolved span is zero-width (e.g. `during` on a tap) or when you want a fixed-length window centered on the action.

SPEED. side ∈ before|during|after. factor > 0, != 1. Every speed segment is explicit — there is no auto pass over `reason: technical` waits. To compress all technical waits, emit one directive per wait line. viewer_readability waits are typically left alone.
